item.title: DEBT: Cache line offsets in MarkdownRenderer
item.intent: Recomputing line offsets on every render wastes CPU on large documents — cache and invalidate only when text changes
item.description: MarkdownRenderer.computeLineOffsets() iterates the full document string on every render() call to build a line-to-UTF16-offset map. For large documents (10K+ lines), this adds measurable overhead even though the text hasn't changed. Cache the line offset array and invalidate only when the source text changes (compare text length or version counter).
acceptanceCriteria: Line offsets are cached and reused across render calls when text is unchanged
Cache invalidates correctly when text changes
Rendering output is identical before and after the change
Performance improvement measurable on 10K-line document (fewer CPU cycles per render)
